Comment: Medallion pipeline: bronze (collect) -> silver (clean) -> gold (aggregate). Each stage is retried twice on transient failures before the execution fails.

RunBronzeCollector.Comment: Invoke the Idealista listings collector. Passes test_mode so dev runs stay within API limits; in prod test_mode is false so all pages are collected.

Retry.Comment: Retry on transient Lambda service errors; exponential back-off to reduce thundering-herd risk.

RunSilverCleaner.Comment: Invoke the silver cleaning Lambda. Empty payload so it uses its own latest-snapshot discovery logic (review L2).

Retry.Comment: Retry on transient Lambda service errors.

RunGoldAggregator.Comment: Invoke the gold aggregation Lambda. Empty payload — aggregates all available silver data.

Retry.Comment: Retry on transient Lambda service errors.
